page_description: Create request records for employees in your department.
list_description: Review department-created requests and related queues.
error_summary: Please fill in all required fields
error_work_dates_required: Please select at least 1 work date
attachment_hint: Supports PDF, JPG, PNG up to 5 MB
half_day_single_date_only: Half day can only be used for a single selected date.
quota_personal: Quota: 3 days (+3 conditional) | Must pass probation
quota_annual: Quota: 15 days/year (requires 12 months) | Blackout periods apply
info_unpaid: Unlimited days | No pay | Used when other leave is exhausted
info_maternity: Female only | Regular salary (base salary only)
info_resign_warn: Must notify at least 30 days in advance (flexible at HR discretion)
info_replacement: Compensate excess leave days | Unlimited days
info_dayoff: Scheduled day off per shift roster
info_return_placeholder: e.g. Returning from day off, maternity leave
warning_notice_period: Warning: the last working day is less than 30 days away, but the request can still be submitted.

errors.employee_required: Please select at least one employee.
errors.employee_scope_invalid: Selected employees must belong to your department.
errors.date_range_invalid: End date must be the same as or later than the start date.
errors.half_day_single_date_only: Half day can only be used for a single selected date.
errors.half_day_required: Please choose morning or afternoon for half day leave.
errors.attachment_too_large: Each attachment must be 5 MB or less.
errors.attachment_invalid_type: Only PDF, JPG, and PNG files are allowed.
errors.last_working_day_required: Please choose the last working day.
errors.work_dates_required: Please add at least one work date.
errors.work_hours_required: Please enter the number of hours worked.
errors.form_invalid: Please fix the highlighted fields and try again.
errors.create_failed: Unable to create the request right now. Please try again.
errors.department_missing: Your account is not linked to a department yet.
errors.update_failed: Unable to update the request right now. Please try again.

edit_page_description: Update the selected request before HR or admin finalizes it.
delete_confirm: Delete this request? This cannot be undone.
existing_attachments_hint: Existing attachments are kept. Upload more files if you need to add extras.
request_locked_message: This request can no longer be edited or deleted because it has already been finalized.
